xly_xlp.text: RISK-ON — XLY/XLP ratio above 20d MA. Consumer discretionary outperforming staples. 5d ROC: +1.71%

stress.text: LOOSE — Financial conditions accommodative (ANFCI: -0.468, NFCI: -0.465, STLFSI: -0.6475). Risk-on environment.

spx_options.ts_implication: Long-term vol priced well above spot — market very calm short-term. Classic low-vol momentum environment. But watch for VIX spikes from complacency lows.
spx_options.gamma_implication: SPY within 3% of max pain ($706). Gravitational pull toward this level is strong. Expect compression and potential pinning into expiry.

macro_summary.text: Regime is EXPANSION with net liquidity EXPANDING and +0.0% 4-week ROC. RRP shock absorber at $1B — critically low, fragile tape. COT positioning: SHORT BUILDING with COT Index 25.6/100. Copper/Gold +0.3% 4wk. Stress regime LOW — green light for momentum (STLFSI4: -0.6475).
